business_question: Which stores generate the highest sales within each region?
business_context: Regional managers want to benchmark store performance and replicate successful practices.
sql_answer:
WITH store_sales AS (
    SELECT
        st.REGION,
        st.STORE_NAME,
        SUM(s.NET_UNITS_SOLD) AS TOTAL_SALES
    FROM FACT_SALES s
    JOIN DIM_STORE st
        ON s.STORE_KEY = st.STORE_KEY
    GROUP BY st.REGION, st.STORE_NAME
)
SELECT *
FROM (
    SELECT
        REGION,
        STORE_NAME,
        TOTAL_SALES,
        RANK() OVER (
            PARTITION BY REGION
            ORDER BY TOTAL_SALES DESC
        ) AS RNK
    FROM store_sales
)
WHERE RNK = 1;
